design_philosophy: Fresh Indian Market. Moving away from sterile light-gray/blue SaaS aesthetics to a warm, vibrant, and tactile experience. Inspired by modern Indian quick-commerce (Blinkit, Zepto) but elevated for personal finance. High contrast, large typography, and expressive colors.

Home.header: Large greeting (e.g., 'Morning, Priya ☀️'). Below it, a massive Budget Card showing total spent in ₹ and a thick rounded progress bar.
Home.ai_insight_bar: A horizontal pill just below the budget card. Soft orange background (#FFF0E6) with text like '💡 You are spending 15% more on Dairy this week.'
Home.list_tabs: Pill-shaped toggle for 'Personal' vs 'Family'. Active state uses #0B6E4F background.
Home.items: Checkboxes should be large circular outlines. When checked, fill with #10B981 and strikethrough the text.

AddItemBottomSheet.layout: Handle at top. Large seamless text input taking focus. Below it, a dynamic row of 3 massive action areas: Keyboard, Voice (Mic Icon), Receipt Scan (Camera Icon).
AddItemBottomSheet.emphasis: Make the Voice and Scan buttons visually dominant (using the #FA6400 accent) to highlight these key differentiators.

History.layout: Grouped by date. Each trip is a collapsed card summarizing the store, total ₹, and number of items. Tap to expand.

Insights.layout: Large expressive charts. Do not use generic thin line charts. Use thick, colorful bar charts with rounded caps. Top spending categories should use large Emoji icons (🥦, 🥛, 🧼) alongside ₹ amounts.

onboarding_backgrounds.description: Fresh apples and tangerines for splash/onboarding texture
Vibrant market vegetables for empty states or insight headers

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use React Native's StyleSheet.create(). Do not use HTML tags like <div> or classes like className='p-4'.
Build a custom floating Bottom Navigation bar over the screen content, avoiding standard unstyled tab bars.
Use the specific Hex codes provided in this JSON. The brand color is Deep Green (#0B6E4F) and vibrant orange (#FA6400) for high-impact actions.
Ensure all interactive components (TouchableOpacity, TextInput) have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., data-testid='add-item-voice-btn').
Format all prices clearly with the ₹ symbol and standard Indian comma formatting (e.g., ₹ 1,500).
For the AI Insight bar, use the highlighted card styling (soft orange or green background) to make it stand out from regular list items.
The hero section of the Home screen must be the Budget display. Use the `currency_large` typography rule for the main amount.
For Voice and Scan functionalities, since this is UI design, build highly visible UI entry points (large icon buttons) even if the hardware API is mocked.
